MINI MINUTES: Dianna L. Albini, Esq., appearing for plaintiff and moving party via telephone conference.
Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Court's Order to Arbitration is heard this day. After argument of counsel, court ordered motion granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration.
A Jury Trial Date of 3/15/2003 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206 is ordered set. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and to give notice of the Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Sarah Lerschen. CSR 6213. (212)
